entity_scope: Bounded write-side preparation and dispatch subsystem
must_provide: system accountability;boundary preservation;delegation governance
must_not_do: carry all narrow operational responsibilities directly;replace mature delegated entities
notes: Assembler Subsystem remains accountable, while execution is delegated to narrower mature carriers.

entity_scope: Final assembler-side delivery boundary actor
must_provide: registry readiness observation;handoff gating;envelope handoff;delivery-cycle flag updates;feedback report production
must_not_do: own registry internals;conflate flags with reports;retain lifecycle authority after valid handoff
notes: Dispatcher remains the final assembler-side actor; Registry / Delivery Port is its outbound contract surface.

entity_scope: Writing/feed-domain round progression and writing waiting-list discipline
must_provide: writing round progression;writable readiness tracking;writing waiting-list indexing;queue-container identifier consumption
must_not_do: store envelopes in waiting list;act as Queue Bundle Agent;collapse with delivery round manager
notes: Writing / Feeding Round Manager is distinct from Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager and from Queue Bundle Agent.

entity_scope: Dispatch/delivery-domain round progression and delivery waiting-list discipline
must_provide: delivery round progression;delivery waiting-list indexing;post-delivery context;requalification path support
must_not_do: store envelopes in waiting list;act as Dispatcher;collapse with writing round manager
notes: Delivery Round Manager supports delivery completion context but Dispatcher owns flags and detailed feedback report artifacts.

entity_scope: Queue bundle orchestration and operational realization over queue structures
must_provide: queue bundle orchestration;operational directive realization;policy-conforming queue ordering;bundle availability support
must_not_do: moderate one queue-container directly;replace Single Queue Moderator;create container above queue
notes: Queue Bundle Agent works at bundle level; Single Queue Moderator works at one queue-container level.

entity_scope: Moderates one queue-container, slots, occupancy, lifecycle, and requalification
must_provide: single queue-container moderation;slot lifecycle maintenance;envelope-slot occupancy binding;queue-container ID requalification
must_not_do: orchestrate full queue bundle;own envelope lifecycle after registry handoff;store envelope in waiting list
notes: Single Queue Moderator operates on one Queue Container and preserves occupancy vs lifecycle distinction.

entity_scope: Schema/directive-governed metadata application component
must_provide: metadata directive application;schema-guided field update;metadata-to-envelope composition support
must_not_do: host Policy Object mechanisms;use EN-FAM-002;bypass administrative metadata authority
notes: Metadata Injector is schema/directive-governed and explicitly not a policy-consuming component.

entity_scope: Mandatory timestamp stabilization component for all accepted ingress paths
must_provide: timestamp stabilization;participation in validating and hot-path ingress;timestamp-to-envelope composition support
must_not_do: remain a placeholder;be optional in hot-path;replace Metadata Injector
notes: Timestamp Stabilizer is mature and mandatory, not a reserved placeholder.

entity_scope: Ingress validation component participating only in validating ingress
must_provide: validating-ingress validation participation;validation candidate preparation support
must_not_do: participate in hot-path externalized validation;replace Envelope Assembler;validate after explicit externalization
notes: Validator participates only where validation authority is assembler-local.

entity_scope: Policy intake, readiness tracking, assignment, and safe-point replacement mediator
must_provide: policy object intake;assignment readiness tracking;component assignment;safe-point replacement coordination
must_not_do: execute mechanism behavior;replace host components;turn Policy Object into implementation executor
notes: PolicyAssigner assigns Policy Objects; host components realize mechanisms.

entity_scope: Client-side composed ingress-preparation contract object associated with Log Level API
must_provide: typed template admission compatibility;validator composition;metadata composition;timestamp stabilization composition;envelope realization
must_not_do: replace Assembler Ingress Port;own queue slots after submission;bypass Metadata Injector;bypass Timestamp Stabilizer
notes: Envelope Assembler produces or prepares the Log Level Envelope inside or alongside the Log Level API.

entity_scope: Server-side receiving contract port for Log Level Envelope admission
must_provide: envelope receiving;contract-shape verification;queue-container targeting;slot admission;handoff into queue runtime
must_not_do: assemble envelope;replace Envelope Assembler;accept policy bundles;accept operational directives;act as registry delivery boundary
notes: Assembler Ingress Port receives the already assembled envelope and admits it into a suitable queue-container slot.

entity_scope: Inbound administrative and ecosystem-level contract port
must_provide: policy bundle receiving;metadata directive receiving;operational directive receiving;administrative boundary separation
must_not_do: receive normal content payloads;bypass PolicyAssigner;bypass Metadata Injector;bypass Queue Bundle Agent;collapse admin input into consuming ingress
notes: Administrative / Ecosystem Port separates administrative/control payloads from consuming content ingress.

entity_scope: Outbound registry-facing contract surface used by Dispatcher
must_provide: registry readiness contract surface;envelope handoff contract surface;receiving-side admission access;lifecycle transfer boundary discipline
must_not_do: replace Dispatcher as actor;own registry internals;own registry-side lifecycle;accept consuming ingress;accept policy bundles
notes: Registry / Delivery Port is the outbound contract surface; Dispatcher remains the actor.

entity_scope: User-facing content ingress facade
must_provide: provide consuming content entry;compose or receive Envelope Assembler depending on integration
must_not_do: act as Assembler Ingress Port;receive administrative directives
notes: Level API is external to the Assembler boundary and is associated with content ingress.

entity_scope: Governance/control source outside Assembler authority boundary
must_provide: provide governance/control input through administrative path
must_not_do: bypass Administrative / Ecosystem Port;enter as consuming content
notes: Assemblers Administrator contributes governance/control payloads through administrative surfaces.

entity_scope: External ecosystem policy source / policy center
must_provide: provide policy bundles and policy objects
must_not_do: assign directly to host components without PolicyAssigner
notes: Policy Registry / Policy Source provides ecosystem-side policy material.

entity_scope: External metadata governance source
must_provide: provide metadata directives through administrative path
must_not_do: bypass Metadata Injector;send metadata through consuming ingress
notes: Metadata Directive Source governs metadata input, not policy-hosting behavior.

entity_scope: External source of pause/drain/scale/activate directives
must_provide: provide operational directives through administrative path
must_not_do: directly mutate queue runtime without Queue Bundle Agent
notes: Operational directives are administrative control input realized internally by Queue Bundle Agent.

entity_scope: Storage-side receiving subsystem outside Assembler lifecycle authority after handoff
must_provide: provide readiness/capacity signal;provide boundary-sufficient receiving admission;own lifecycle after valid handoff
must_not_do: be treated as assembler-owned internals;be bypassed by non-dispatcher handoff
notes: Log Level Records Registry is external receiver; Assembler must not own registry internals.

entity_scope: Explicit non-authority read/query world outside Assembler authority
must_provide: remain outside assembler write-side authority
must_not_do: become assembler read/query authority;be treated as internal responsibility carrier
notes: Reading / Querying Subsystem is explicitly excluded from Assembler authority.

entity_scope: Runtime grouping entity that groups multiple queue-containers
must_provide: group queue-containers for bundle-level orchestration
must_not_do: act as Queue Bundle Agent;replace Queue Container
notes: Queue Bundle is governed by Queue Bundle Agent; it is not the actor.

entity_scope: Queue-as-container runtime structure containing slots
must_provide: contain slots;serve as queue-container target;preserve Queue = Container doctrine
must_not_do: be replaced by separate runtime container;own envelope lifecycle after registry handoff
notes: Queue Container is the queue itself as container.

entity_scope: One queue-container operated on by Single Queue Moderator
must_provide: act as one queue-container target for moderation
must_not_do: act as moderator;represent full bundle
notes: Single Queue Container is the runtime object moderated by Single Queue Moderator.

entity_scope: Queue-container under waiting/pending discipline
must_provide: represent pending/waiting queue-container state
must_not_do: store envelope instead of queue-container ID
notes: Waiting discipline concerns queue-container identifiers, not envelopes.

entity_scope: Occupancy position inside a Queue Container
must_provide: provide occupancy position;participate in lifecycle state
must_not_do: own envelope lifecycle after handoff;act as queue container
notes: Slot is inside Queue Container and participates in occupancy and lifecycle state.

entity_scope: Binding showing Log Level Envelope occupies a Slot
must_provide: represent envelope-slot binding/state
must_not_do: imply envelope lifecycle ownership;replace Log Level Envelope
notes: Envelope Slot Occupancy is binding/state, not lifecycle ownership.

entity_scope: Slot readiness, release, requalification, eligibility, or drained state
must_provide: represent slot lifecycle state and requalification readiness
must_not_do: represent registry-side envelope lifecycle;replace dispatcher delivery flags
notes: Slot Lifecycle State applies to slot state, not registry-side envelope lifecycle.

entity_scope: Writing-side waiting list holding next available queue-container identifiers
must_provide: store queue-container identifiers for writing/feeding rounds
must_not_do: store envelopes;act as Queue Bundle Agent
notes: Writing waiting list stores queue-container identifiers, not envelopes.

entity_scope: Delivery-side waiting list holding next available queue-container identifiers
must_provide: store queue-container identifiers for delivery/dispatch rounds;receive requalified IDs
must_not_do: store envelopes;replace Delivery Round Manager
notes: Delivery waiting list stores queue-container identifiers and may receive requalified queue-container IDs.

entity_scope: Reference/locator that identifies or locates a queue-container from waiting lists
must_provide: locate Queue Container;support waiting-list selection;support requalification return
must_not_do: point to envelope;represent envelope lifecycle
notes: Queue Container Identifier locates a queue-container only.

entity_scope: Classification-only grouping for queue runtime concepts
must_provide: group queue runtime concepts for analysis
must_not_do: appear as primary_delegated_entity;replace Queue Bundle Agent;replace Single Queue Moderator;replace Round Managers
notes: Queue Runtime Layer is not a delegated entity.
